info.name: Sheikh Travel System API
info.description:
Full Postman collection generated from the live OpenAPI spec.

1. Set `baseUrl` (default http://localhost:5082).
2. Run **Auth → POST api / auth / login** to save `accessToken` and `refreshToken`.
3. All other admin endpoints inherit Bearer auth from the collection.
4. Customer Hub folder uses `noauth` for public portal calls; set `portalPhone`.

Regenerate: `node Backend/scripts/build-postman-collection.mjs`
